SEARCH
Package com.comp2042.service.gameloop

Class GameServiceImpl

java.lang.Object
com.comp2042.service.gameloop.GameServiceImpl
All Implemented Interfaces:
GameService
public class GameServiceImpl extends Object implements GameService
Implementation of the GameService interface.

This class provides the core game logic operations by delegating to a Board instance. It acts as a facade for the game board operations, providing a clean interface for game mode implementations and ensuring proper separation of concerns.

Key responsibilities:

  • Delegate game operations to the underlying Board instance
  • Handle movement and rotation event processing
  • Manage game state transitions and scoring
  • Provide clean abstraction for game mode implementations
Author:
Dong, Jia.

  • Constructor Details

    • GameServiceImpl

      public GameServiceImpl(Board board)
      Constructs a GameServiceImpl with the specified board. Uses dependency injection to follow Dependency Inversion Principle (DIP).
      Parameters:
      board - the game board instance (must not be null)
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if board is null

  • Method Details

    • createDefault

      public static GameServiceImpl createDefault()
      Creates a GameServiceImpl with a default SimpleBoard. This factory method provides a convenient way to create a service with default configuration while still maintaining DIP compliance (the board creation is explicit).
      Returns:
      a new GameServiceImpl instance with a default SimpleBoard (10x20)

    • getBoard

      public Board getBoard()
      Description copied from interface: GameService
      Gets the game board instance.
      Specified by:
      getBoard in interface GameService
      Returns:
      the game board

    • getScore

      public Score getScore()
      Description copied from interface: GameService
      Gets the score tracker instance.
      Specified by:
      getScore in interface GameService
      Returns:
      the score tracker

    • processDownEvent

      public DownData processDownEvent(MoveEvent event)
      Description copied from interface: GameService
      Processes a DOWN movement event. Moves the falling brick down one position and handles landing logic.
      Specified by:
      processDownEvent in interface GameService
      Parameters:
      event - the move event containing type and source
      Returns:
      down data containing view information and row-clearing results

    • processLeftEvent

      public ViewData processLeftEvent(MoveEvent event)
      Description copied from interface: GameService
      Processes a LEFT movement event. Moves the falling brick one position to the left.
      Specified by:
      processLeftEvent in interface GameService
      Parameters:
      event - the move event containing type and source
      Returns:
      view data containing updated brick position and shape

    • processRightEvent

      public ViewData processRightEvent(MoveEvent event)
      Description copied from interface: GameService
      Processes a RIGHT movement event. Moves the falling brick one position to the right.
      Specified by:
      processRightEvent in interface GameService
      Parameters:
      event - the move event containing type and source
      Returns:
      view data containing updated brick position and shape

    • processRotateEvent

      public ViewData processRotateEvent(MoveEvent event)
      Description copied from interface: GameService
      Processes a clockwise rotation event. Rotates the falling brick 90 degrees clockwise.
      Specified by:
      processRotateEvent in interface GameService
      Parameters:
      event - the move event containing type and source
      Returns:
      view data containing updated brick position and rotated shape

    • processRotateCCWEvent

      public ViewData processRotateCCWEvent(MoveEvent event)
      Description copied from interface: GameService
      Processes a counterclockwise rotation event. Rotates the falling brick 90 degrees counterclockwise.
      Specified by:
      processRotateCCWEvent in interface GameService
      Parameters:
      event - the move event containing type and source
      Returns:
      view data containing updated brick position and rotated shape

    • setDropSpeed

      public void setDropSpeed(int speed)
      Description copied from interface: GameService
      Sets the drop speed for automatic brick falling. Lower values result in faster falling.
      Specified by:
      setDropSpeed in interface GameService
      Parameters:
      speed - the new drop speed in milliseconds between automatic drops

    • startNewGame

      public void startNewGame()
      Description copied from interface: GameService
      Starts a new game session. Resets the board, score, and spawns the first brick.
      Specified by:
      startNewGame in interface GameService

    • isGameOver

      public boolean isGameOver()
      Description copied from interface: GameService
      Checks if the game has ended. Game over occurs when a new brick cannot be spawned.
      Specified by:
      isGameOver in interface GameService
      Returns:
      true if the game is over, false otherwise

    • processHoldEvent

      public ViewData processHoldEvent(MoveEvent event)
      Description copied from interface: GameService
      Processes a hold event. Swaps the current brick with the held brick, or stores the current brick if none is held.
      Specified by:
      processHoldEvent in interface GameService
      Parameters:
      event - the move event containing type and source
      Returns:
      view data containing updated brick position and hold state

    • getNextBrick

      public int[][] getNextBrick()
      Description copied from interface: GameService
      Gets the next brick shape data for preview display.
      Specified by:
      getNextBrick in interface GameService
      Returns:
      the next brick shape matrix, or null if unavailable

    • getDropSpeed

      public int getDropSpeed()
      Gets the current drop speed.
      Returns:

      Checks if the current brick can move down.
      Returns:
